action.reasoning: Observation: current best rmse_z500=452.07 (iter 8, UNet base_channels=128, positional channels, dropout=0.1). Fine-tuning (iter 12) degraded performance to 456.87. Remaining time ~0.59h (35 min). Analysis: Overfitting after epoch 5 indicates need for stronger regularization. Longitudinal shift augmentation (circular roll) is natural for periodic global grid and should improve generalization. Cosine annealing schedule may also help. Decision: Update dataset.py to add random longitude shift during training, increase dropout to 0.15, use cosine annealing LR schedule. Train from scratch with 4 epochs (est. 28 min, leaving time for eval). Then submit eval.
